positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a celestial deer (cervus alicorn) standing amidst bioluminescent flora and ethereal mist. The composition is symmetrical and centralized, featuring deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with glowing gold and ivory highlights. Elements include gracefully arcing, iridescent antlers, delicate star-like foliage, and softly glowing, oversized mushrooms. The style should be neo-traditional botanical etching mixed with Art Nouveau linework, ensuring clean silhouettes and strong, comic-book-style contrast suitable for screen printing. High detail, vector quality, perfect for apparel transfer, centered, symmetrical composition, flat lay presentation.
negative: blurry, messy, realistic photo, photorealistic, low contrast, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, noise, grain, jpeg artifacts, muddy colors
